mapper.select: SELECT tb_resignation.*, tb_user.employee_number, tb_user.nick_name, tb_post.post_name, tb_department.dept_name, handover_user.nick_name AS handover_user_name FROM tb_resignation INNER JOIN tb_user ON tb_resignation.user_id = tb_user.id AND tb_user.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN tb_post ON tb_user.post_id = tb_post.id AND tb_post.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN tb_department ON tb_user.department_id = tb_department.id AND tb_department.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN tb_user handover_user ON tb_resignation.handover_user_id = handover_user.id AND handover_user.is_deleted = 0 WHERE tb_resignation.is_deleted = 0 AND tb_resignation.id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
